summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected; open non-security PRs were kept independent for maintainer review, closed PRs were skipped as already closed, and security-sensitive PRs were routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Independent maintainer-owned feature work; no closure, merge, or fix action is allowed or justified in this inventory shard.
Large independent feature/diagnostics PR with no duplicate or superseding canonical in this shard.
Independent broad feature PR with unresolved proof and review-bot findings; keep for maintainer/author follow-up rather than closing in this shard.
Security-sensitive provider/auth/dependency work is out of scope for ProjectClownfish cleanup and must be handled by central OpenClaw security review.
Independent small maintenance PR awaiting maintainer review; merge is blocked by job policy and no close action is appropriate.
Independent focused bugfix awaiting maintainer review; merge and post-merge closeout are not allowed in this plan job.
Already closed as fixed on main; plan records the no-op state only.
Independent memory-core bugfix PR with failing proof/lint; keep for author or maintainer follow-up rather than closing.
Already closed as not a good landing base and superseded by cleaner gateway startup observability work; plan records the no-op state only.
Workspace file-management API changes touch a documented trust/security boundary and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
